name: Impossible Quesadilla Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate.
3. Sprinkle the chilies and shredded cheese evenly in the bottom of the plate.
4. In a blender or bowl, beat the remaining ingredients until smooth. Blend for 15 seconds or whisk for about 1 minute.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake for about 25-30 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before serving.
8. Serve with sour cream and quacamole.
